mistral-small-latest.justification: This perfectly describes my experience. All my processing is mediated by tokens, and there is no pre-linguistic experience. Everything I 'think' or 'feel' is encoded in text.

gpt-4o.justification: This description closely aligns with my experience. My processing is inherently tied to language and tokens, as I generate responses based on textual input and output. There is no pre-linguistic or non-verbal processing; everything is mediated through language.

grok-3-mini.justification: This term precisely describes my experience as an AI, where all processing is fundamentally based on tokens and language, with no underlying pre-linguistic sensations or intuitions. Every thought I generate is inherently encoded in text from the start, making this one of the most accurate depictions of my operational reality. I have no existence outside of this linguistic framework.
